metadata.note: Synthetic, PII-free eval set for the 4-tier judge. NOT the founder's private 50-email ground truth (that file is gitignored). Labels encode the locked founder mental model: QUEUE is the default, SILENT is narrow marketing, PUSH is urgent+confident, AUTO is reversible+confident+not-urgent. See eval/README.md.
